subsection.heading: Report required
subsection.chapeau: Not later than one year after June 30, 2016, and thereafter not less than once every two years, the Comptroller General of the United States shall submit to Congress a report on the public debt of each territory, including—

paragraph.content: the historical levels of each territory’s public debt, current amount and composition of each territory’s public debt, and future projections of each territory’s public debt;
the historical levels of each territory’s revenue, current amount and composition of each territory’s revenue, and future projections of each territory’s revenue;
the drivers and composition of each territory’s public debt;
the effect of Federal laws, mandates, rules, and regulations on each territory’s public debt; and
the ability of each territory to repay it’s 11 So in original. Probably should be “its”. public debt.

content.p: The government of each territory shall make available to the Comptroller General of the United States all materials necessary to carry out this section.
